76141.subject: OKX Pools Tokenized Stocks Into One Book
76141.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[OKX](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-launches-tokenized-us-stocks-on-shared-order-book)**[ launches shared order book for 40+ tokenized US stocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-launches-tokenized-us-stocks-on-shared-order-book)

* **[Tokenized-stock](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/tokenized-stock-lending-tvl-reaches-23m-as-dex-volume-climbs)**[ lending TVL hits $23M ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/tokenized-stock-lending-tvl-reaches-23m-as-dex-volume-climbs)

* **[Robinhood Earn](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/robinhood-earn-crosses-100m-in-deposits-tenev-says)**[ crosses $100M in deposits, lending USDG through Morpho for ~7%](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/robinhood-earn-crosses-100m-in-deposits-tenev-says)

* **[CASHCAT](https://thedefiant.io/news/tokens/cashcat-falls-75-from-peak-after-hyperliquid-perp-listing)**[ falls 75% from peak after Hyperliquid perp listing](https://thedefiant.io/news/tokens/cashcat-falls-75-from-peak-after-hyperliquid-perp-listing)

Tokenized stocks have had a distribution problem: every issuer mints its own version of Apple or Nvidia, splitting liquidity across incompatible tokens. OKX just tried to collapse that into one market.

**OKX** [launched Unified Tokenized Stocks](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/okx-launches-tokenized-us-stocks-on-shared-order-book), a shared order book where 40+ US equities, **XAAPL**, **XNVDA**, **XTSLA** and others, trade against **USDT**, routing every issuer's version of a stock into a single market backed by Backed Assets' xStocks. US and EU traders are barred.

It arrives the same day data showed tokenized-stock lending and DEX volume climbing. Real traction, but still a rounding error next to the rest of DeFi.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

##### PARTNER

Caption: 

_The Defiant_ and **Alumni Ventures** are teaming up this week only to give readers early [access to high-potential startup opportunities](https://www.av.vc/funds/blockchain/the-defiant-ad?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tofu&utm_content=partner-follow-up&utm_campaign=TheDefiantJulyESend), including some of today's most exciting Blockchain & Fintech startups co-invested alongside top VC firms like Paradigm & Pantera Capital.

**You get:**

* Curated deal flow of high-potential Blockchain & Fintech startups

* No cost

* No commitment to join

* Invest only if a company excites you

**[See Blockchain & Fintech Deals Today →](https://www.av.vc/funds/blockchain/the-defiant-ad?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tofu&utm_content=partner-follow-up&utm_campaign=TheDefiantJulyESend)**

76136.subject: Permissionless markets win
76136.body:
View this post on the web at https://uniswap.substack.com/p/permissionless-markets-win

this week: robinhood chain accelerates ∞ new uniswap ai skills drop ∞ 65K hooks and counting ∞ let’s build, lisbon 
Community news
Permissionless markets win: Uniswap volume on Robinhood Chain passed $6B this week [ https://substack.com/redirect/4ef929cb-8301-4fed-ad7b-c55f7c3d6567?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], including its first $1B+ day. Now, CCA and Uniswap Auctions are live [ https://substack.com/redirect/33ab23b5-2c11-4fa5-a03c-c7a4a2a07eaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on the chain. You can run a fully onchain token auction, discover a credible market price, and bootstrap liquidity into a Uniswap v4 pool from day one.
Ship onchain strategies in minutes: Uniswap Trading Tools [ https://substack.com/redirect/96939667-3900-4465-abca-f4f973168d1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] are here. The new plugin includes three new skills for building automated trading strategies, with support for crypto-native tokens and RWAs. dca-bot buys a set amount of a token on a repeating schedule, index-bot defines a basket of tokens and rebalances it to target weights, and copy-trade mirrors another wallet’s swaps inside limits you set. Uniswap Trading Tools were designed for Robinhood Chain, but work across any chain supported by Uniswap Skills. [ https://substack.com/redirect/dbae3c29-eca3-4b19-bcb1-14b91f4f4051?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 
Uniswap now routes through LitePSM: Which means any route that needs a DAI, USDS, or USDC leg can clear that hop at parity. Sky’s Peg Stability Module [ https://substack.com/redirect/8631204e-e9a2-421e-a4d7-b776102e53d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] offers hundreds of millions of dollars in depth with effectively no price impact. This is another important step forward toward’s Spark’s Stablecoin FX layer vision. Next up: the DualPool hook [ https://substack.com/redirect/f69e1a88-9673-474c-90ab-59c3d6018eb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. 
A v4 hook for real estate: Manifest’s USH is a liquid token that gives exposure to US residential real estate. The token mints, redeems, and trades through a single Uniswap v4 hook that holds the target price with protocol-owned liquidity and screens every swap against an allowlist. You can learn more about it here [ https://substack.com/redirect/a53e2094-61ff-4367-93f1-217454d1dcf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. 
Less than a week to ETHGlobal Lisbon: The UF is providing $10K prizes for Uniswap developers integrating the API and contributing to the stack. The hackathon kicks off on Friday, and you should register [ https://substack.com/redirect/78a7cd89-e30d-4e5f-9da3-4e1b95c03359?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpb

76135.subject: 🟪 Friday Charts
76135.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

==“Someone said to me 'To you football is a matter of life or death!' and I said 'Listen, it's more important than that.'”==
_— _==_Bill Shankly_==



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3c0c80ec-ec26-4f80-8935-06ac36a0ff2d/image.png?t=1784320312)
Caption: 

# ==Friday Charts==

France played most of the first match of the first World Cup with ten men after their goalkeeper suffered a broken jaw contesting a shot. There were no substitutions in 1930, so they put a midfielder in goal.

They won anyway, 4-1 over Mexico, but hardly anyone saw it. Attendance was estimated at just 4,400 spectators. Only 300 watched Romania beat Peru.

The entire tournament was played in one city, Montevideo, Uruguay.

The match balls were not always the same. Argentina and Uruguay both insisted on using their own. When they met in the final, Argentina’s ball was used in the first half and Uruguay’s in the second. 

Wardrobes were not always coordinated. When Bolivia played Brazil, both teams had brought white jerseys to play in. Bolivia borrowed Uruguay's blue shirts for the match. 

For their first match, Bolivia had played in jerseys that spelled out Viva Uruguay. The third “U” was unfortunately missing for the pre-game photo shoot:

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e806c0c4-6522-4505-82ea-07e782e7a859/image.png?t=1784320465)
Caption: 

Why _Bolivia_ wore Uruguay on their shirts is sadly lost to history, but it might have been because the Uruguayan Football Association had covered some of their expenses.

There was no prize money on offer. To attract teams, Uruguay offered to pay for everyone’s travel and accommodation.

Even so, the cost was part of the reason why only four of the 13 participating teams came from Europe. England, Italy, Spain, Germany and Holland all decided to stay home. 

In 1930, it took 16 days to cross the Atlantic by steamship, so European players would be away from home for roughly two months — which meant being away from their day jobs for two months.

Most football players were amateurs at the time, but even the professionals would have needed a day job to supplement th

76133.subject: The Daily Degen - July 17th, 2026
76133.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-17th-2026

Happy Friday good frogs!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.228T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $697.15
Gold: $4,009.80
Silver: $56.02
Oil (WTI): $81.92
US 10Y Treasury: 4.549%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 33
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change) 
Spotlight
Quai continues to see huge success as 2026 rolls on!
Quai defi is making headlines as of late, and Quainance is now live on the network, facilitating some massive defi-maxxing opportunities [ https://substack.com/redirect/55d4efdf-1831-457e-bbfe-ee2651b4b990?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for Quai-enthusiasts! (see below!) 
In addition, there was an extremely cool recent announcement as well, concerning the team’s paper- “Optimal Reward Allocation via Proportional Splitting”- that has been accepted to the Advances in Financial Technologies (AFT) 2026 conference at the London School of Economics in London!
The paper documents the novel architecture that allows PoW to scale- based on something the Quai gigabrains call’ workshares’- and they will be presenting it later this year at the above-noted conference (sponsored by a16z and Input/Out).  
Once again, with R&D out of the University of Texas, @QuaiNetwork [ https://substack.com/redirect/b6b08974-b677-4265-a974-3ddfe2d9f6f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] is a highly scalable proof-of-work EVM-compatible blockchain based on tokenizing energy, and incorporating a gigabrain dual-token model involving $QUAI and $QI - with $QUAI as the main token and $QI as a privacy flatcoin that also is the world’s first “energy dollar”… 
We are always pumped to be spreading the good word about what Quai is up to, so make sure to follow @QuaiNetwork [ https://substack.com/redirect/b9d1dad7-2ccf-40df-9c9b-c10e4ecf20fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] on Twitter/X for more info!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $10M TVL include Robinhood Chain, XDC, and Monad.  
Protocols are also mixed today. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $10M TVL include Arcus (uncategorized protocol on Robinhood Chain), Twyne (lending protocol on ETH Mainnet), and Baseline Protocol (multichain liquidity manager).

Here’s The Top 12 Protocols By TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Fee Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly laun
